title: Vulkan droid
description: "A perfomance Modpack with Vulkan Mod and that work with Android devices in mind"
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2135057fb4246a96c346eb0d7931b4cfedb3cf4e.png)"A perfomance Modpack with Vulkan Mod and libraries that work with Android devices in mind"

What is Vulkan Droid?

This modpack was put together for Android users that want to use OR try the Vulkan Mod with the proper libraries it needs to actually work.  Make sure to pay attention the the tips and check the tips/important info section.  Vulkan Mod is still being worked on as well, and it might be more performant on some devices but not on others as it was originally made for PC in mind.

Help it's not working!

You need to enable Use system Vulkan driver in the launcher you choose for this Modpack to work.  You can watch the video guide as well to learn how to set this up properly.  Some Adreno GPU devices can utilize Turnip drivers but they aren't as performant.

Tips/Important Info

Vulkan 1.2+ supports devices (has been known to work with 1.0+ but not guaranteed).
Dynamic Rendering is required for 1.21.11 +
Enable Use system Vulkan driver, this will automatically allow this mod to work.
Shaders DO NOT work currently.
Other mods Check This may not work as there's a list of incomatible mods.
Tinkering with video settings CAN still help with more FPS
No libraries are needed for 1.21.11+ anymore
Libraries for older versions below 1.21.10 can be found here - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vulkanmod-android-libs

1.21.11 Confirmed Device List (01/31/26)
26.1+ Confirmed Device List
Redmagic 11 Pro (requires VulkanDreno which is in this pack)
Redmagic 10 Pro (requires VulkanDreno which is in this pack)
Anbernic RG557 (Poco X6/X7 Pro Should work too with D8300/D8400 Chipsets)
Anbernic Rg556 (Unisoc T618 Chipset - MaliG57 GPU)
